languages.original_text: "You need not fear the fruits of carnage, servant — the warrior fears only cowardice, which leaves no scars!"

languages.text: "Не стоит бояться плодов сечи, слуга — воин страшится лишь трусости, которая не оставляет шрамов!"
"You need not fear the fruits of carnage, servant — the warrior fears only cowardice, which leaves no scars!"
languages.original_text: "Не стоит бояться плодов сечи, слуга — воин страшится лишь трусости, которая не оставляет шрамов!"

traits.locale_text: "You need not fear the fruits of carnage, servant — the warrior fears only cowardice, which leaves no scars!"
"You need not fear the fruits of carnage, servant — the warrior fears only cowardice, which leaves no scars!"
"You need not fear the fruits of carnage, servant — the warrior fears only cowardice, which leaves no scars!"

languages.text: 「血の果実を恐れる必要はない、召使いよ。戦士は臆病さのみを恐れる。傷跡を残さないものだ！」
languages.original_text: "You need not fear the fruits of carnage, servant — the warrior fears only cowardice, which leaves no scars!"

traits.locale_text: 「血の果実を恐れる必要はない、召使いよ。戦士は臆病さのみを恐れる。傷跡を残さないものだ！」

languages.text: « Vous n'avez pas à craindre les fruits du carnage, serviteur. Un guerrier craint seulement la lâcheté, qui ne laisse pas de cicatrices ! »
languages.original_text: "You need not fear the fruits of carnage, servant — the warrior fears only cowardice, which leaves no scars!"

traits.locale_text: « Vous n'avez pas à craindre les fruits du carnage, serviteur. Un guerrier craint seulement la lâcheté, qui ne laisse pas de cicatrices ! »

languages.text: "Ihr müsst die Früchte des Gemetzels nicht fürchten, Diener ... der Krieger fürchtet nur Feigheit, die wiederum keine Narben hinterlässt."
languages.original_text: "You need not fear the fruits of carnage, servant — the warrior fears only cowardice, which leaves no scars!"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr müsst die Früchte des Gemetzels nicht fürchten, Diener ... der Krieger fürchtet nur Feigheit, die wiederum keine Narben hinterlässt."

languages.text: "Kıyımın meyvelerinden korkmana gerek yok hizmetkâr. Savaşçı sadece iz bırakmayan korkaklıktan korkar!"
languages.original_text: "You need not fear the fruits of carnage, servant — the warrior fears only cowardice, which leaves no scars!"

traits.locale_text: "Kıyımın meyvelerinden korkmana gerek yok hizmetkâr. Savaşçı sadece iz bırakmayan korkaklıktan korkar!"

languages.text: «No tema el fruto de la matanza; ¡un buen guerrero solo teme la cobardía, pues no deja cicatriz!».
languages.original_text: "You need not fear the fruits of carnage, servant — the warrior fears only cowardice, which leaves no scars!"

traits.locale_text: «No tema el fruto de la matanza; ¡un buen guerrero solo teme la cobardía, pues no deja cicatriz!».

languages.text: “仆从，不必畏惧杀戮之果——战士只畏惧懦弱，那是一种无痕的溃烂！”
languages.original_text: "You need not fear the fruits of carnage, servant — the warrior fears only cowardice, which leaves no scars!"

traits.locale_text: “仆从，不必畏惧杀戮之果——战士只畏惧懦弱，那是一种无痕的溃烂！”
